2604.10678.title: FedRio: Personalized Federated Social Bot Detection via Cooperative Reinforced Contrastive Adversarial Distillation
2604.10678.paper_summary: Social bot detection is critical to the stability and security of online social platforms. However, current state-of-the-art bot detection models are largely developed in isolation, overlooking the benefits of leveraging shared detection patterns across platforms to improve performance and promptly identify emerging bot variants. The heterogeneity of data distributions and model architectures further complicates the design of an effective cross-platform and cross-model detection framework. To address these challenges, we propose FedRio (Personalized Federated Social Bot Detection with Cooperative Reinforced Contrastive Adversarial Distillation framework. We first introduce an adaptive message-passing module as the graph neural network backbone for each client. To facilitate efficient knowledge sharing of global data distributions, we design a federated knowledge extraction mechanism based on generative adversarial networks. Additionally, we employ a multi-stage adversarial contrastive learning strategy to enforce feature space consistency among clients and reduce divergence between local and global models. Finally, we adopt adaptive server-side parameter aggregation and reinforcement learning-based client-side parameter control to better accommodate data heterogeneity in heterogeneous federated settings. Extensive experiments on two real-world social bot detection benchmarks demonstrate that FedRio consistently outperforms state-of-the-art federated learning baselines in detection accuracy, communication efficiency, and feature space consistency, while remaining competitive with published centralized results under substantially stronger privacy constraints.
2604.10678.paper_summary_zh: 社交機器人檢測對於線上社交平台的穩定性和安全性至關重要。<lb/>然而，目前最先進的機器人檢測模型大多是在孤立的情況下開發的，忽略了利用跨平台共享檢測模式來提高性能和及時識別新興機器人變體的好處。<lb/>數據分佈和模型架構的異質性進一步複雜化了有效的跨平台和跨模型檢測框架的設計。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了FedRio（個性化聯邦社交機器人檢測與協作強化對比對抗蒸餾框架）。<lb/>我們首先為每個客戶端引入一個自適應消息傳遞模塊，作為圖神經網絡的骨幹。<lb/>為了促進全球數據分佈的高效知識共享，我們設計了一種基於生成對抗網絡的聯邦知識提取機制。<lb/>此外，我們採用多階段對抗對比學習策略，以強化客戶端之間的特徵空間一致性，並減少本地模型和全球模型之間的差異。<lb/>最後，我們採用自適應伺服器端參數聚合和基於強化學習的客戶端參數控制，以更好地適應異質聯邦環境中的數據異質性。<lb/>在兩個真實世界的社交機器人檢測基準上進行的大量實驗表明，FedRio在檢測準確性、通信效率和特徵空間一致性方面始終優於最先進的聯邦學習基準，同時在實質上更強的隱私約束下，仍然與已發表的集中結果具有競爭力。
2604.10678.author: Yingguang Yang et.al.
2604.10678.authors: Yingguang Yang, Hao Liu, Xin Zhang, Yunhui Liu, Yutong Xia, Qi Wu, Hao Peng, Taoran Liang, Bin Chong, Tieke He, Philip S. Yu
